natural_language_question: What was the total Global Equity (sum of customer equity across TP + IBAN + Options + custodied assets) as of 2026-06-08?
sql_used:
SELECT
    SUM(pop.Equity) AS total_global_equity
FROM main.etoro_kpi_prep.v_population_funded pop
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = pop.RealCID
   AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
   AND pop.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE pop.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total Global Realized Equity (excluding mark-to-market unrealized PnL on open positions) as of 2026-06-08?

JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked AS snap
    ON snap.RealCID = aum.CID
   AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
   AND aum.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE aum.DateID = 20260608

natural_language_question: What was the total amount in USD of external (non-internal-transfer) deposits to the Trading Platform on 2026-06-08? External deposits are payments made from outside the eToro ecosystem (e.g. card or wire from a customer's bank).
sql_used:
SELECT
    SUM(m.AmountUSD) AS total_external_deposits_usd
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms m
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = m.CID
   AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
   AND m.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE m.DateID = 20260608
  AND m.MIMOPlatform = 'TradingPlatform'
  AND m.IsMoneyIn = 1
  AND m.IsInternalTransfer = 0

natural_language_question: How many customers made their first-ever Trading-Platform deposit on 2026-06-08? This is the TP-platform-specific FTD count (not Global FTD).
sql_used:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mimo.CID) AS tp_ftd_count
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms mimo
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked snap
    ON snap.RealCID = mimo.CID
   AND snap.IsValidCustomer = 1
   AND mimo.DateID BETWEEN snap.FromDateID AND snap.ToDateID
WHERE mimo.DateID = 20260608
  AND mimo.MIMOPlatform = 'TradingPlatform'
  AND mimo.IsInternalTransfer = 0
  AND mimo.IsIBANQuickTransfer = 0
  AND mimo.MoneyIn > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_mimo_allplatforms prev
      WHERE prev.CID = mimo.CID
        AND prev.MIMOPlatform = 'TradingPlatform'
        AND prev.IsInternalTransfer = 0
        AND prev.IsIBANQuickTransfer = 0
        AND prev.MoneyIn > 0
        AND prev.DateID < 20260608
  )
